useState<any>(null);\n  const [showVoucherModal, setShowVoucherModal] = useState(false);\n  const 
[applicableShopNames, setApplicableShopNames] = useState<string>(\"Toàn bộ hệ thống\");\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    
const fetchVoucherConfig = async () => {\n      try {\n        const configSnap = await getDoc(doc(db, 
\"system_config\", \"admin_settings\"));\n        if (configSnap.exists()) {\n          const data = 
configSnap.data();\n          \n          let isActive = false;\n          if (data.isVoucherOpen) {\n            
isActive = true;\n          } else if (data.voucherStartTime && data.voucherEndTime) {\n            const now = new 
Date().getTime();\n            const start = new Date(data.voucherStartTime).getTime();\n            const end = new 
Date(data.voucherEndTime).getTime();\n            if (now >= start && now <= end) {\n              isActive = true;\n

applicableProducts exist\n            if (data.applicableProducts && data.applicableProducts.length > 0) {\n

where(\"role\", \"==\", \"provider\"));\n                const snap = await getDocs(q);\n                const 
matchedShops = snap.docs\n                  .map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() }))\n                  .filter((s: any) 
=> data.applicableProducts.includes(s.id))\n                  .map((s: any) => s.displayName || s.name || \"Cửa

**Filtering Pattern:** Using `createdAt` (handling both Firestore `Timestamp` objects via `.toDate()` and standard

relies on multiple `onSnapshot` listeners to keep local state updated; filters are applied to the local state arrays 
before rendering.\n- **Performance:** Opportunistic deletion (in `notification.tsx`) and filtering (in views) avoids
